title: PokePaintings
description: A collection of pokemon paintings. Perfect for a Cobblemon or Pokemon themed server.
body:
This datapack + resourcepack combo introduces 15 new paintings with pokemon as the forefront. 

Put the Datapack in your Datapack Folder (Server) and the Resource Pack in your resource folder (Client). Don't Forget to Enable the resource pack in game! 

All pokemon are on a plain colored background though I may update the paintings to include a slight textured background. 

**Included Pokemon:**
- Aaron
- Azurill
- Groovyle
- Lotad
- Minun
- Mudkip
- Plusle
- Poochyena
- Ralts
- Roselia
- Sabelye
- Seedot
- Torchic
- Treecko
- Whismur
- Cacnea
- Charizard
- Swablu
- Pikachu
- Zangoose
- Lunatone
- Solrock
- Lileep
- Castform (and Sunny, Rainy and Snowy)

I would like to add more pokemon and pokemon themed paintings.
- Numel
- Spoink
- Spinda
- Trapinch
- Pokeballs
- & more!

None of the pokemon are done by me, all are done by JoshR691, and Mudkip is done by Faux, and Zangoose by Neweegee - used with permission.
